basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Odisha (WCD Odisha)
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced for the Anganwadi Helper posts in Sonepur through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as on 01-01-2023
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years as on 01-01-2023

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 12th pass. Knowledge of Odia language (read, write, speak).
qualification.details: Must be a permanent resident of the Anganwadi center area. Minimum 12th pass. Knowledge of Odia language (read, write, speak).

selection_process: Document Verification Merit List based on qualifications
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Anganwadi Helper posts is 19th June 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed at least the 12th grade. Additionally, proficiency in reading, writing, and speaking the Odia language is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 35 years as of January 1, 2023. Age relaxations may apply for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Anganwadi Helper positions in the Dunguripali block of Odisha.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted online through the official portal of WCD Odisha. No offline applications will be accepted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive an honorarium as per the prevailing government norms. Specific salary details are usually provided in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Anganwadi Helper posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves document verification and the preparation of a merit list based on the candidate's qualifications.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Anganwadi Helper position?
faq.answer: The Anganwadi Helper positions are offered on a contract basis, providing an opportunity to serve the community.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
